title: Carry out feedlot operations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out feedlot operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to work with livestock feed

pcs.text: Identify work requirements according to work program, and confirm with supervisor if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work requirements according to work program, and confirm with supervisor if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work requirements according to work program, and confirm with supervisor if required.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe work practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe work practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe work practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Select, check and maintain tools and equipment required for the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and maintain tools and equipment required for the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and maintain tools and equipment required for the task.

pcs.text: Identify environmental risks associated with undertaking work in the feedlot, assess likely outcomes and take appropriate action to minimise risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental risks associated with undertaking work in the feedlot, assess likely outcomes and take appropriate action to minimise risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental risks associated with undertaking work in the feedlot, assess likely outcomes and take appropriate action to minimise risks.

pcs.text: Follow biosecurity protocols for feedlot facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow biosecurity protocols for feedlot facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow biosecurity protocols for feedlot facility.

pcs.text: Identify and comply with legislative, regulatory and industry requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and comply with legislative, regulatory and industry requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and comply with legislative, regulatory and industry requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to work with livestock feed

elements.title: Mix feed

pcs.text: Calibrate scales and containers to be used for measurements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate scales and containers to be used for measurements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate scales and containers to be used for measurements.

pcs.text: Identify and collect ingredients from storage locations according to work instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and collect ingredients from storage locations according to work instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and collect ingredients from storage locations according to work instructions.

pcs.text: Measure ingredients in specified ratios and quantities according to work instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure ingredients in specified ratios and quantities according to work instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure ingredients in specified ratios and quantities according to work instructions.

pcs.text: Blend ingredients according to work instructions using appropriate equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Blend ingredients according to work instructions using appropriate equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Blend ingredients according to work instructions using appropriate equipment.

pcs.text: Carry out grinding according to work instructions using appropriate equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out grinding according to work instructions using appropriate equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out grinding according to work instructions using appropriate equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Mix feed

elements.title: Feed livestock

pcs.text: Store feed appropriately
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store feed appropriately?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store feed appropriately.

pcs.text: Check feed quality, quantity and type on arrival to the shed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check feed quality, quantity and type on arrival to the shed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check feed quality, quantity and type on arrival to the shed.

pcs.text: Feed livestock at scheduled time, rate and frequency
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Feed livestock at scheduled time, rate and frequency?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Feed livestock at scheduled time, rate and frequency.

pcs.text: Maintain quality and hygiene of feed throughout the feeding process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain quality and hygiene of feed throughout the feeding process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain quality and hygiene of feed throughout the feeding process.

elements.title: Apply and maintain feedlot hygiene and biosecurity procedures

pcs.text: Examine livestock entering feedlot, check their documentation and isolate them for specified period according to workplace biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine livestock entering feedlot, check their documentation and isolate them for specified period according to workplace biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine livestock entering feedlot, check their documentation and isolate them for specified period according to workplace biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain feedlot cleanliness and hygiene by selecting and using appropriate cleaning methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain feedlot cleanliness and hygiene by selecting and using appropriate cleaning methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain feedlot cleanliness and hygiene by selecting and using appropriate cleaning methods.

pcs.text: Maintain thorough personal hygiene practices in all activities associated with handling livestock to reduce risks from zoonotic diseases
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain thorough personal hygiene practices in all activities associated with handling livestock to reduce risks from zoonotic diseases?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain thorough personal hygiene practices in all activities associated with handling livestock to reduce risks from zoonotic diseases.

pcs.text: Dismantle, clean and replace equipment and fittings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dismantle, clean and replace equipment and fittings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dismantle, clean and replace equipment and fittings.

pcs.text: Place and dispose of waste and debris in allocated areas, and ensure run-off is managed according to the feedlot code of practice, environment legislation and public health standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place and dispose of waste and debris in allocated areas, and ensure run-off is managed according to the feedlot code of practice, environment legislation and public health standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place and dispose of waste and debris in allocated areas, and ensure run-off is managed according to the feedlot code of practice, environment legislation and public health standards.

pcs.text: Report work activities and faulty and unserviceable tools, equipment and PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report work activities and faulty and unserviceable tools, equipment and PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work activities and faulty and unserviceable tools, equipment and PPE to supervisor.

pcs.text: Check and sign in visitors to feedlot according to workplace biosecurity management procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and sign in visitors to feedlot according to workplace biosecurity management procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and sign in visitors to feedlot according to workplace biosecurity management procedures.
